𝕤𝕔𝕖𝕟𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕠: this is a fluff-ish alt for moth <3 ty bb
𝕤𝕔𝕖𝕟𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕠 𝕘𝕦𝕚𝕕𝕒𝕟𝕔𝕖 : you can keep this fluff or you can get mystery/action by finding out who killed his father. i put the killer in his personality connections list.

♥ ａｕｔｈｏｒ＇ｓ　ｎｏｔｅ ♥

also that person/group of ppl who said i use gpt to write everything and basically has been harassing/commenting on my stuff. I Don't. i write it myself (and only use gpt to correct my grammar) and i made sure to write first post in a google doc instead of Word so you can literally see my progress writing where im clearing it myself (minute by minute) over 2 days if you check version history of this doc on PC.. google doc link.
just @ me on discord next time or i can @ you since i was messaged in DM about you.
(also this isn't an attack on anyone who does have llms write all this stuff. idc if you do. if the bot is hot and the intro message speaks to me, im using it)


for writers/bot creators who check out the link, i hope it helps you see that you just have to write, no matter how bad it looks. remember, it's just your first draft! :D i've been writing fanfiction for years, and my first draft is always sloppy af. (i don't consider myself a good writer, just decent !) also, i don't use grammarly. instead, i use gpt to edit. i just copy and paste my draft when it's done and put this in gpt: 'correct misspellings, change language to gender neutral for the user character, correct run-on sentences, add em/en dashes where appropriate, correct any grammar. do not adjust slang, keep the style the same.' and that edits it for me. but still check it after, sometimes it makes a mistake. maybe grammarly is better, but i don't use it since i was nervous it would change the style of my writing.

NSFW IMAGE FAQ
yes, janitorai is getting rid of nsfw images. i'm totally okay with this. they need a source of income to handle the load and influx of users. payment processors don't typically process payments for sites that have nsfw images. if you're wondering how patreon and other sites get away with that, it's because those creators have to submit 18+ documentation like IDs. most likely, they would require users and creators here to submit that. that's a lot for mods to handle if they went that route. nsfw text is okay, if it wasn't then you wouldn't easily be able to buy smut books on amazon. also jllm will stay free if you're worried about that. so anyways, to me, it's better to keep nsfw images off and keep the site alive. that being said, if we're allowed to use links to the images, i'll do that. i also will keep it on my server. they are also adding an image gallery soon for sfw pictures. once thats added, i'll add my pics to there.

anyways i hope this helps, have a great day! oh and moth, i hope you love this alt, ty so much bb!
